applicability_notes: Pure data-movement broadcast/tile op. Frequently used as a workaround for missing implicit broadcasting before binary eltwise ops, batched matmul over an expert dimension ([1,1,T,H] -> [1,E,T,H]), attention-mask head expansion ([B,1,Q,K] -> [B,H,Q,K]), and replicating decode logits to 32 rows for topk/sampling kernels ([1,1,1,V] -> [1,1,32,V]). repeat(1,1,...) may alias the input (see BGE-M3 batch_size==1 guard), so a fuser must not assume a fresh buffer for identity repeats.; torch_pattern_source: registered _golden_function: `return tensor.repeat(shape[0], shape[1], shape[2], shape[3])`; unit test: `torch_result = torch_input_tensor.repeat(repeat_shape)`

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, num_attention_heads, seq_len, seq_len] (row-major, tilized immediately after)
placement_observations.source: Falcon-style model call site: ttnn.repeat(tt_attention_mask, ttnn.Shape([1, num_attention_heads, 1, 1]), memory_config=model_config['ATTN_MASK_MEMCFG']) followed by ttnn.tilize with same memcfg (ATTN_MASK_MEMCFG is the model's interleaved DRAM mask config)

BGE-M3 embeddings call site: position_ids = ttnn.repeat(pos_prefix, (batch_size, 1), memory_config=self.config.embedding_memcfg); skipped entirely when batch_size == 1 because repeat(1,1) may alias the input

placement_observations.tensor_role: output (activation replicated across expert dim for batched matmul)
placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, num_experts_per_device, total_tokens, hidden_size] large prefill activation
placement_observations.source: GPT-OSS experts MLP call site: post_dispatch = ttnn.repeat(post_dispatch, ttnn.Shape((1, num_experts_per_device, 1, 1))); downstream expert matmuls explicitly use ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG (default interleaved DRAM output for repeat)

placement_observations.tensor_role: output (decode logits replicated to 32 sampling users)
placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, 1, 32, vocab] (vocab 2048-3072, padded to 8192 afterwards for multicore topk)
placement_observations.source: Sampling call site: logits_32 = ttnn.repeat(logits_tt, ttnn.Shape([1, 1, 32, 1])) feeding ttnn.topk/ttnn.sampling; no explicit memory_config (default interleaved DRAM)
